abstract: Pass/fail review gate for Elixir on the BEAM: two blind reviewers judge a diff or file set against 19 decidable rules that catch architecture imported from an alien paradigm — enterprise layering, processes as objects, anemic data modeling, defensive control flow, imperative iteration, and needless metaprogramming — each rule carrying the artifact evidence that decides PASS/FAIL/N/A with fail-closed carve-outs. Converted from the v0.1.0 distillation skill of the same name; judgment-call guidance lives in staff-level-elixir.
